text.title: Behavior Parity Verification Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the per-stage parity report. The artefact is the contract: a migration that has not produced a schema-valid report has not done parity verification, regardless of how much shadow traffic flowed.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "bpv-quote-stage3", "scope": "/api/v2/quote", "observable_fields": ["response.total_cents", "response.line_items[].sku", "response.currency", "response.tax_breakdown"], "ramp_stage": 3, "window_start": "2026-05-20T00:00:00Z", "window_end": "2026-05-21T00:00:00Z", "total_compared": 47812, "diff_rate": 0.21, "clusters": [ {"cluster_id": "tax-rounding-pt", "sample_count": 12, "disposition": "fixed"}, {"cluster_id": "currency-fx-tolerance", "sample_count": 88, "disposition": "accepted-with-justification", "justification": "Legacy used 4-dp FX; new uses 6-dp. Difference within ±0.01 cents per line, acceptable per finance review."} ], "verdict": "promote", "signed_off_by": "ruslan@faion.net", "signed_off_at": "2026-05-21", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-21" }

example.note: observable_fields empty (violates r1); ramp_stage=5 outside enum (1..4); total_compared=12 < 1000 minimum; window timestamps not date-time format; missing version, last_reviewed, signed_off_*; verdict=promote with zero clusters analysed is meaningless at this sample size.

antipattern.description: Diff store keeps raw request/response bodies including PII (emails, names, tokens).
antipattern.reason: Parity infra becomes a PII honeypot. Normalize PII fields to hashes or redact before persisting; observable comparison uses the hash.

antipattern.description: Skipping the diff store and relying on a single diff_rate gauge.
antipattern.reason: A gauge says something diverged; without per-sample storage you cannot find the cluster or the input that triggered it.

antipattern.description: Auto-promoting between ramp stages by timer alone.
antipattern.reason: r3 requires diff-rate + cluster-review gating. A timer-only promoter is r3 violation and will be tripped by long-tail traffic.
